title: satureja × benthamifolia
intro: Satureja × benthamifolia, also known as Balm Mint or Spotted Savory, is a hybrid plant species within the Lamiaceae family, resulting from the cross between Satureja montana and Clinopodium menthifolium. The leaves and flowers of this plant possess medicinal properties, particularly exhibiting antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its therapeutic value. The health benefits of Satureja × benthamifolia include relief from digestive issues, reduction of stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory function. This plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be utilized to harness its medicinal properties.
